name: Glory Hole
description:
WARNINGS: MUSK, LIP FETISH, GASLIGHTING.

You wake up in an unfamiliar room, and as your vision gains focus you can only see what looks like a dirty wall in front of you with a set of Plump golden bimbo lips coming outside it... Where you are and why is that here?

--> Artist: Adri164 <--



Mia here bringing you a weird/ no so weird bot! It depends on your perspective, to be honest. Anyway, I hope you perverts enjoy the putrid Glory Hole mouth. Fuck the mouth with all your might! Or make service it by giving that putrid thing a big o' kiss. to make sure you guys saw it the artist is Adri164! I am just saying this because the credit got quite small between those images.
creator: Mia4Fun
